audience: an audience following "the world cup final"
insight: the audience is so used to seeing "friend group photo" that they scroll past it, but "team poster style" is enough to make them stop for a second look

generationPrompts.image: Subject is friend group photo, with visual details grafting in team poster style. Style: editorial photography, shallow depth of field, centered composition with negative space, natural light, 16:9
